stock_market.summary: Escalating Iran conflict has created energy supply shocks and pushed oil prices higher, leading to significant declines across major U.S. stock indices. Brent crude has surged towards $120/bbl due to Strait of Hormuz blockade concerns.

art_market.summary: Market is characterized by cautious optimism and strategic reorganization in 2026, with a focus on selective buying and blue-chip artists amid global economic uncertainty.
